name: pm-platform
description: PM Platform — Jira + Confluence + AI/MCP internal team platform

scripts.dev:be:go: concurrently -k -n gateway,auth,workspace,page,file -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan "pnpm dev:gateway" "pnpm dev:auth" "pnpm dev:workspace" "pnpm dev:page" "pnpm dev:file"
scripts.dev:be: concurrently -k -n gateway,auth,workspace,page,file,issue -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan,red "pnpm dev:gateway" "pnpm dev:auth" "pnpm dev:workspace" "pnpm dev:page" "pnpm dev:file" "pnpm dev:issue"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n web,gateway,auth,workspace,page,file -c green,blue,cyan,yellow,magenta,gray "pnpm dev:web" "pnpm dev:gateway" "pnpm dev:auth" "pnpm dev:workspace" "pnpm dev:page" "pnpm dev:file"
